goal: Build complete prompt engineering system: templates, grounding, schemas, caching, versioning

decisions.decision: Use XML tags for system prompt structure instead of markdown or plain text
decisions.rationale: XML creates unambiguous section boundaries (<role>, <capabilities>, <instructions>, etc.). Models parse XML reliably and it enables automated prompt auditing.

decisions.decision: Implement 10 grounding rules with two-layer defense: prevention (rules in prompt) + detection (validator)
decisions.rationale: Real estate data has legal/financial implications. Rules tell agents what not to do. Validator catches when they do it anyway. Two layers for defense in depth.

decisions.decision: Use Zod for output schemas instead of JSON Schema or TypeBox
decisions.rationale: Zod provides runtime validation + TypeScript inference from a single source. Already used in orchestration layer for consistency.

log.detail: Read orchestration types and agent registry to understand agent capabilities for prompts

cd agentic-ai && npm run build — compiles cleanly

cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — grounding tests passing
Add grounding rules and GroundingValidator for fabricated data detection
Completed PRMT-002, claimed PRMT-004 (Zod schemas) and PRMT-007 (agent prompts)
Created 4 Zod schemas: IntentClassification, PropertySearch, MarketAnalysis, Recommendation
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — schema valid/invalid tests passing
Add Zod output schemas for intent, property, market, and recommendation responses
Created 6 agent-specific system prompts (property-search through quality-reviewer) with consistent XML structure
cd agentic-ai && npm run build — all 7 prompts compile cleanly
Add 7 role-specific XML system prompts for all domain agents
Completed PRMT-004 and PRMT-007. Also marking PRMT-006 done (validator was part of PRMT-002 work).

summary: Built the complete prompt engineering foundation. Completed 5 beads: PRMT-001 (XML template), PRMT-002 (10 grounding rules + validator), PRMT-004 (4 Zod schemas), PRMT-006 (fabrication detector), PRMT-007 (7 agent prompts). All verified. Remaining: PRMT-003 (versioning), PRMT-005 (caching), PRMT-008 (XML tag cleanup).
